The right-hand side `RelIO.liftFinf n (╬╗ i => g (f i))` is a new `AssocList` produced by `RelIO.liftFinf n` but with the function `f` replaced by `╬╗ i => g (f i)`.

- `1 ÔåĞ f 1`
- ...
- `(n-1) ÔåĞ f (n-1)`
